data.body: USER_APPROVAL (2026-04-20): Approved for LLM-behavioral fix — edit plugins/dso/docs/workflows/REVIEW-WORKFLOW-HUGE.md to add WORKFLOW_PLUGIN_ARTIFACTS_DIR propagation to all write-reviewer-findings.sh dispatches. Port 21d7-b84a fix pattern. Secondary: harden emit-commit-workflow-event.sh to error when unset.
